metadata.name: CompleteFlexElectrodep
metadata.description: Testing of full liquid handling, reactor control and furnace control
metadata.author: user

params.description: Enhanced electrochemical measurement with real-time data collection and element sequencing

metadata.description: Various electrochemical measurement techniques (OCV, CP, CVA, PEIS, LSV)

description.label: Description
description.defaultValue: Enhanced electrochemical measurement with real-time data collection and element sequencing

cva_cycles.label: Number of Cycles
cva_cycles.description: Number of CV cycles to perform

peis_start_frequency.label: Start Frequency
peis_start_frequency.description: Starting frequency for impedance sweep (10kHz from script)

peis_end_frequency.label: End Frequency
peis_end_frequency.description: Ending frequency for impedance sweep (0.1Hz from script)

peis_points_per_decade.label: Steps per Decade
peis_points_per_decade.description: Number of measurement steps per frequency decade (5 from script)

peis_minimum_cycles.label: Minimum Cycles
peis_minimum_cycles.description: Minimum number of cycles per frequency point

peis_bias_vs_ocp.label: Bias vs OCP
peis_bias_vs_ocp.description: Apply DC bias relative to OCP

lsv_start_voltage.label: Start Voltage
lsv_start_voltage.description: Starting voltage for linear sweep voltammetry

lsv_end_voltage.label: End Voltage
lsv_end_voltage.description: Ending voltage for linear sweep voltammetry

data_collection_enabled.label: Data Collection Enabled
data_collection_enabled.description: Whether to collect data from this measurement step

cycle_dependent_collection.label: Cycle Dependent Collection
cycle_dependent_collection.description: Data collection depends on current cycle number (controlled by Sequence Control)

data_tag.label: Data Tag/Label
data_tag.description: Tag for identifying this data in analysis (e.g., "Deposition", "Dissolution", "Rest")

sequence_cycles.label: Sequence Cycles
sequence_cycles.description: Number of complete deposition-dissolution cycles to perform

cp_deposition_current.label: Deposition Current
cp_deposition_current.description: Applied current for deposition (negative for cathodic)

ocv_post_deposition_duration.label: OCV Duration
ocv_post_deposition_duration.description: Duration of OCV measurement after deposition

peis_post_deposition_points_per_decade.label: Points per Decade
peis_post_deposition_points_per_decade.description: Number of measurement points per frequency decade

peis_post_deposition_dc_bias.label: DC Bias
peis_post_deposition_dc_bias.description: DC bias voltage for PEIS measurement

peis_post_deposition_bias_vs_ocp.label: Bias vs OCP
peis_post_deposition_bias_vs_ocp.description: Apply bias relative to open circuit potential

peis_post_deposition_min_cycles.label: Minimum Cycles
peis_post_deposition_min_cycles.description: Minimum number of cycles per frequency point

cp_dissolution_current.label: Dissolution Current
cp_dissolution_current.description: Applied current for dissolution (positive for anodic)

ocv_post_dissolution_duration.label: OCV Duration
ocv_post_dissolution_duration.description: Duration of OCV measurement after dissolution

peis_post_dissolution_points_per_decade.label: Points per Decade
peis_post_dissolution_points_per_decade.description: Number of measurement points per frequency decade

peis_post_dissolution_dc_bias.label: DC Bias
peis_post_dissolution_dc_bias.description: DC bias voltage for PEIS measurement

peis_post_dissolution_bias_vs_ocp.label: Bias vs OCP
peis_post_dissolution_bias_vs_ocp.description: Apply bias relative to open circuit potential

peis_post_dissolution_min_cycles.label: Minimum Cycles
peis_post_dissolution_min_cycles.description: Minimum number of cycles per frequency point

real_time_data_collection.label: Real-time Data Collection
real_time_data_collection.description: Enable real-time DC/AC data callbacks during measurement

data_save_enabled.label: Save Data to Files
data_save_enabled.description: Automatically save measurement data to CSV files

experiment_name_template.label: Experiment Name Template
experiment_name_template.description: Template for experiment file naming (use {timestamp} for auto-timestamp)

element_logging_enabled.label: Element Logging
element_logging_enabled.description: Log element start/stop events for debugging
